scripts.seed:reset: npm run seed:delete && npm run seed:edge-cases
scripts.docker:migrate: docker-compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec backend sh -c "rm -rf node_modules/.prisma node_modules/@prisma/client && npx prisma generate && npx prisma migrate deploy"
scripts.docker:migrate:dev: docker-compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec backend sh -c "rm -rf node_modules/.prisma node_modules/@prisma/client && npx prisma generate && npx prisma migrate dev"
scripts.docker:migrate:fix: docker-compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec backend sh -c "rm -rf node_modules/.prisma node_modules/@prisma/client .prisma && npx prisma validate && npx prisma generate && npx prisma migrate deploy"
scripts.docker:migrate:reset: docker-compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec backend sh -c "npx prisma migrate reset --force"
scripts.docker:migrate:status: docker-compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec backend sh -c "npx prisma migrate status"
scripts.docker:prisma:generate: docker-compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec backend sh -c "rm -rf node_modules/.prisma node_modules/@prisma/client && npx prisma generate"
scripts.docker:migrate-resolve: docker-compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml run --rm backend sh -c "npm install && npx prisma migrate resolve --applied 20250101000000_init"
scripts.docker:migrate-fix: docker-compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec backend sh -c "npx prisma migrate resolve --rolled-back 20260127041736_clean_collection_slugs && npx prisma migrate deploy"
scripts.docker:migrate-create: docker-compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml run --rm backend npx prisma migrate dev --name add_collection_slug --create-only
scripts.docker:seed:delete: docker-compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec backend npx ts-node prisma/delete-collections.ts
scripts.docker:seed:edge-cases: docker-compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec backend npx ts-node prisma/seed-edge-cases.ts
scripts.docker:seed:reset: docker-compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec backend sh -c "npx ts-node prisma/delete-collections.ts && npx ts-node prisma/seed-edge-cases.ts"
